error_signature: Loop Over Items does not loop over an array inside one item
title: Loop Over Items node not iterating as expected
symptom: The Loop Over Items node runs only once instead of multiple times when provided with a single item containing an array.
applies_when: Input is a single item with an array
not_this_if: Input is an array of items
root_cause: The Loop Over Items node is designed to iterate over multiple items, not over an array contained within a single item. When the input is a single item with an array, it treats it as one item and does not perform multiple iterations.
fix_steps: Replace the Set node with a Code node before the Loop Over Items node.
In the Code node, create an array of objects, each with a 'json' key, to represent the items you want to loop over.
Connect the Code node to the Loop Over Items node.
agent_instruction: Use a Code node to generate multiple items for the Loop Over Items node.
